<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_1980607_enterp_0_it_request</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Claude AI Triage</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

    try {
        var description = current.getValue('request_description');
        
        // Call Claude API
        var sm = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2('x_1980607_enterp_0.Claude Anthropic API', 'Triage');
        sm.setStringParameterNoEscape('description', description);
        
        var response = sm.execute();
        var parsed = JSON.parse(response.getBody());
        var text = parsed.content[0].text;
        text = text.replace(/```json\n?/g, '').replace(/```\n?/g, '').trim();
        var result = JSON.parse(text);
        
        current.setValue('category', result.category);
        current.setValue('priority', result.priority);
        current.setValue('ai_summary', result.summary);
        current.update();
        
        // Send Slack notification
        var slack = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2('x_1980607_enterp_0.Slack Notification', 'Send Message');
        slack.setStringParameterNoEscape('description', description);
        slack.setStringParameterNoEscape('category', result.category);
        slack.setStringParameterNoEscape('priority', result.priority);
        slack.setStringParameterNoEscape('summary', result.summary);
        slack.execute();
        
    } catch(e) {
        gs.error('Claude AI Triage error: ' + e.message);
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-05 20:21:27</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>9b8a9cca93080310a16cf7a75d03d65f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>6</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Claude AI Triage</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="EnterpriseDesk AI" source="x_1980607_enterp_0">a136848293840310a16cf7a75d03d6eb</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="EnterpriseDesk AI">a136848293840310a16cf7a75d03d6eb</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_9b8a9cca93080310a16cf7a75d03d65f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-05 21:49:42</sys_updated_on><template/><when>async_always</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=9b8a9cca93080310a16cf7a75d03d65f"/></record_update>
